plugins.name: fdeos
plugins.description: Second brain for Forward Deployed Engineers: one @fde entry point that routes by situation (land, discover, build, rescue, ship, close), does the phase work, and writes per-customer engagement memory itself. Healthcare, fintech, and government overlays included.
